name: Ultra Pro Laptop 15"
description: Powerful 15-inch laptop with Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and a stunning 4K display. Perfect for professionals and creators.

name: Wireless Noise-Cancel Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Premium sound for audiophiles on the go.

name: 4K AMOLED Smartwatch
description: Track your health, fitness, and stay connected with this feature-packed smartwatch with always-on display.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit full-size mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches for ultimate gaming precision.

name: Designer Silk Kurta Set
description: Luxurious pure silk kurta with intricate embroidery. Perfect for festive occasions and formal events.

name: Premium Leather Sneakers
description: Handcrafted genuine leather sneakers with memory foam insole. Style meets comfort for everyday wear.

name: Elegant Wristwatch - Gold
description: Swiss-inspired quartz movement in a stunning gold stainless steel case. Timeless elegance for every occasion.

name: Smart Air Purifier Pro
description: HEPA H13 filter removes 99.97% of pollutants. Smart sensor auto-adjusts fan speed. App-controlled.

name: Minimalist Coffee Table
description: Scandinavian-inspired solid wood coffee table with a tempered glass top. Elevate your living space.

name: Chef's Pro Knife Set (8-Pc)
description: Professional-grade German stainless steel knife set. Razor-sharp edges for precision cutting every time.

name: Pro Yoga Mat (6mm Extra Thick)
description: Non-slip, eco-friendly TPE yoga mat with alignment lines. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and home workouts.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5-50kg
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbell replacing 15 pairs. Quick-change dial system from 5kg to 50kg.

name: Carbon Fiber Badminton Racket
description: Professional carbon fiber racket with 30-lbs strung tension. Lightweight yet powerful for competitive play.

name: Atomic Habits – James Clear
description: The ultimate guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones. Over 10 million copies sold worldwide.

name: Deep Work – Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. A must-read for knowledge workers in the digital age.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: 20% Vitamin C + Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide serum for glowing, even-toned skin. Dermatologist tested.

name: Retinol Night Repair Cream
description: Advanced retinol 0.5% formula with peptides reduces fine lines and wrinkles overnight. For all skin types.

name: Wireless Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° immersive sound in a compact, waterproof body. 24-hour battery for non-stop music everywhere.

name: Resistance Bands Set (5 Levels)
description: Set of 5 resistance bands from 10-50lbs for full-body strength training at home or gym.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser + Essential Oils
description: Ultrasonic cool mist diffuser with 7 ambient LED colors. Includes 6 premium essential oil bottles.
